# A11yKit — Free WCAG & EAA Accessibility Tools

> URL: https://a11ykit.site/
> Title: A11yKit — Free WCAG 2.2 & EAA Compliance Accessibility Tools
> Description: 15 free online accessibility tools for WCAG 2.2 and EAA compliance. Contrast checker, WCAG checklist, accessibility statement generator, ARIA generator, and more. 100% client-side, no account required.
> Author: A11yKit Team
> Version: 2.0.0
> Full Content: https://a11ykit.site/llms-full.txt

A11yKit is a free, open accessibility toolkit containing 15 free online tools for WCAG 2.2 and EAA (European Accessibility Act) compliance. All tools run 100% client-side in your browser — no account is required, no data is sent to any server, no analytics are collected on tool inputs, and no tracking cookies are used.

## Core Features
- **100% Client-side**: Your HTML, CSS, colors, and data never leave your browser. Perfect for auditing internal, secure, or staging environments.
- **EAA & WCAG Aligned**: Built to align with WCAG 2.2 Success Criteria, ADA Title II, European standard EN 301 549, and US Section 508.
- **Zero Friction**: Free forever, no signup or registration, no ads, and 100% private.

## Tools (All Live)

### Check & Audit
- [Color Contrast Checker](https://a11ykit.site/tools/contrast-checker): Verify foreground/background contrast ratios against WCAG 2.1/2.2 AA and AAA thresholds, with live preview and compliant color suggestions.
- [WCAG 2.2 Compliance Checklist](https://a11ykit.site/tools/wcag-checklist): Interactive checklist covering all 86 WCAG 2.2 success criteria (A/AA/AAA), POUR filters, local progress saving, Markdown/JSON export.
- [HTML Accessibility Scanner](https://a11ykit.site/tools/html-scanner): Paste HTML for an instant audit of alt text, ARIA usage, landmarks, and semantics; optional axe-core deep scan with 50+ WCAG 2.2 A/AA rules.
- [URL Website Scanner](https://a11ykit.site/tools/url-scanner): Scan any public URL (single page or 10-page crawl) for 20+ WCAG 2.2 checks, with axe-core deep scan and export.
- [Heading Structure Analyzer](https://a11ykit.site/tools/heading-analyzer): Visualize heading outlines, flag skipped levels, missing or multiple H1s, and headings used for styling.
- [Form Label Checker](https://a11ykit.site/tools/form-label-checker): Validate label-input associations, fieldset/legend grouping, and placeholder misuse against WCAG 2.1.
- [Link Text Checker](https://a11ykit.site/tools/link-text-checker): Find ambiguous link text ("click here", "read more"), empty links, and URL-only links per WCAG 2.4.4.
- [Focus Order Checker](https://a11ykit.site/tools/focus-order-checker): Visualize keyboard tab sequences and flag illogical focus order per WCAG 2.4.3.
- [Alt Text Checker](https://a11ykit.site/tools/alt-text-checker): Audit images for missing, empty, filename-based, or overly long alt text per WCAG 1.1.1.
- [PDF Accessibility Checker](https://a11ykit.site/tools/pdf-checker): Client-side pdf.js checks for tagging, language, title metadata, bookmarks, and extractable text (WCAG / PDF/UA).
- [Accessibility Monitor](https://a11ykit.site/tools/accessibility-monitor): Track a website's accessibility score over time with locally stored scan history and trend indicators.

### Generate & Fix
- [Accessibility Statement Generator](https://a11ykit.site/tools/accessibility-statement): Wizard that produces a publish-ready accessibility statement aligned with EAA (EU 2019/882), ADA, and Section 508.
- [ARIA Role & Attribute Generator](https://a11ykit.site/tools/aria-generator): Generate correct WAI-ARIA 1.2 markup (roles, states, keyboard patterns) for common UI patterns, in HTML or JSX.
- [AI Alt Text Generator](https://a11ykit.site/tools/alt-text-generator): Batch-generate WCAG-compliant alt text in 30+ languages using your own OpenAI API key, directly from the browser.

### Simulate
- [Color Blindness Simulator](https://a11ykit.site/tools/color-blind-simulator): Preview images through 8 types of color vision deficiency (Brettel/Viénot/Mollon algorithm), with severity slider and CSS filter export.

## System Info & Standards
- Primary Standards Supported: WCAG 2.2, EAA (Directive EU 2019/882), EN 301 549, ADA Title II, Section 508, WAI-ARIA 1.2.
- Tech Stack: Pure client-side HTML, CSS, React, TypeScript.
- Repository: https://github.com/gstar-byte/a11ykit
